title: coccothrinax muricata subsp. savannarum
intro: Coccothrinax muricata subsp. savannarum, also known as the Cuban palm, is a subspecies of palm tree native to Cuba. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Coccothrinax muricata subsp. savannarum include potential uses in treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
